cards.prompt: list[0].Inc() над List<Counter> (struct) — что печатает list[0].N?
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; struct Counter { public int N; public void Inc() { N++; } } var list = new List<Counter> { new Counter { N = 0 } }; list[0].Inc(); Console.WriteLine(list[0].N);

cards.prompt: readonly-поле V, Bump() не readonly: Touch()=>V.Bump(); что печатает {r} {h.V.N}?
cards.code: using System; struct Val { public int N; public int Bump() { N++; return N; } } readonly struct Holder { public readonly Val V; public Holder(Val v) { V = v; } public int Touch() => V.Bump(); } var h = new Holder(new Val { N = 10 }); int r = h.Touch(); Console.WriteLine($"{r} {h.V.N}");

cards.prompt: struct P с P(){X=42;}: P a=default; P b=new P(); что печатает {a.X} {b.X}?
cards.code: using System; struct P { public int X; public P() { X = 42; } } P a = default; P b = new P(); Console.WriteLine($"{a.X} {b.X}");
